branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Gravity / black-hole observable; matter-side per Einstein-eq source coupling

description: Bekenstein-Hawking entropy and area law. The entropy-to-area ratio S_BH/A returns exactly 1/4 in both regimes (P1, P2'). In addition, the bound state S_BH = 4 pi M^2 (the Schwarzschild Bekenstein-Hawking signature) is verified to <0.05% in both regimes. This is a stronger statement than the causal-wave 1/4 landing of Paper 2: the ratio is here a direct horizon-counting result on the relational defect, not an enumeration-induced numerical coincidence.
area_law_verified_by: Jacobson-Einstein derivation (3/3 checks passed in both regimes)
framing: The 1/4 coefficient here is a primary horizon-counting result on the relational defect. The causal-wave landing in Paper 2 (alpha_xi/2 - 2*gamma = 0.24999) is a cross-sector consistency check, not a redundant claim.
